profile.name: Cường Q. Huỳnh
profile.title: Master Orchestrator · IP Assets Professional · Data Architect
profile.summary: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of knowledge governance, infrastructure architecture, and multi-agent AI orchestration.
profile.about: I operate at the convergence of information science, technical architecture, and AI orchestration. My work spans IP custodianship systems, multi-agent workflows, and governance models that ensure traceability and institutional memory. Every artifact carries a clear chain of custody.

bullets: Designed and deployed multi-agent AI orchestration systems (Claude, GPT, Perplexity, Gemini)
Authored DESIGN-CANON-2026-001 — ratified personal design system with cryptographic provenance
Built document custody framework: SHA-256 + UUIDv7 multi-party signing protocol
Established Virtual Library architecture on NotebookLM for institutional knowledge curation
Designed scalable data governance frameworks for enterprise knowledge assets
Architected end-to-end data pipelines with full traceability and audit trails
Led technical architecture reviews and strategic roadmaps

projects.title: Master Canon Design Specification
projects.summary: Personal universal design system (DESIGN-CANON-2026-001). Four themes, five morphism styles, full CSS variable system, cryptographic signing protocol.

star.situation: Five independent design specs with unresolved conflicts — no unifying Canon.
star.task: Synthesise into one authoritative design language covering all media types.
star.action: Resolved font-stack conflicts, dual-role exceptional colour, morphism context rules; authored 10-part spec with Appendix C signing protocol.
star.result: DESIGN-CANON-2026-001 v1.0.0 ratified. Governs all visual output.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Knowledge Pipeline
projects.summary: Orchestration system coordinating Claude, GPT, Perplexity, and Gemini for research synthesis with attribution chains and traceability.

star.situation: Multi-model research synthesis with no attribution tracking or conflict resolution.
star.task: Build a pipeline with full traceability and verifiable cross-model attribution.
star.action: Designed agent role specifications, cross-model routing logic, attribution chain logging.
star.result: Fully attributed multi-source outputs with zero untraced claims.

projects.title: Document Custody & Signing System
projects.summary: Provenance framework using SHA-256 hashing, UUIDv7 timestamping, and multi-party signature chains for institutional document integrity.

star.situation: Institutional documents lacked verifiable provenance and non-repudiation.
star.task: Design a cryptographically sound, operationally simple signing protocol.
star.action: Implemented sign(SHA-256(content) | UUIDv7 | timestamp | context) composite signature; three-layer chain: Contributor → System → Authority.
star.result: All Canon-governed artifacts carry tamper-evident, verifiable provenance.

projects.title: NotebookLM Knowledge Architecture
projects.summary: Curated knowledge graph on NotebookLM enabling structured retrieval, cross-domain synthesis, and AI-assisted literature review.

star.situation: Research materials fragmented across tools; no unified retrieval or synthesis layer.
star.task: Build a persistent, curated knowledge architecture with AI-assisted synthesis.
star.action: Structured source taxonomy, cross-domain link graph, RAG retrieval layer on NotebookLM.
star.result: Significantly reduced research retrieval time; enabled cross-domain synthesis previously requiring extensive manual effort.
